marshallese.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Ñan awa PM ālikin raelep, bōk 12 jān awa eo.
marshallese.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Ñan awa AM, awa eo ej pād wōt āinwōt.
marshallese.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Kaṃakūt juon representation im lale ekōjkan analog, 12-hour, im 24-hour awa rej pād im koba.
marshallese.set_exact_clock_time: Likūt awa in clock eo ejiṃwe
marshallese.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Ajej juon interval ñan jumps repidodo ñan awa eo eobrak, innem koba jumps ko.
marshallese.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Interval eo ej zero, kōn menin jino im jeṃḷọk rej āinwōt juon.
marshallese.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Kōjerbal 12-hour wāween kōn AM ak PM.
marshallese.enter_a_time_such_as_13_25_or_1_25_pm: Likūt juon awa, āinwōt 13:25 ak 1:25 PM.
marshallese.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Likūt minit ak juon duration, āinwōt awa 1 min 15.
marshallese.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Ejjañin. Jeje jumps ikōtaan awa ko ruo im kajjioñ bar juon alen.
marshallese.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Keidi aetokan events, free-time gaps, im depakpakin aolepān juon plan.
marshallese.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Kakōḷḷe awa ko ruo ioon juon number line. Kālọk ñan awa eobrak epidodo, kobaik awa ko rejeṃḷọk, innem kadedeḷọk kōn minit ko rej pād wōt.
marshallese.enter_a_time_such_as_18_40_or_6_40_pm: Likūt juon awa, āinwōt 18:40 ak 6:40 PM.
marshallese.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Likūt minit ak juon duration, āinwōt awa 2 min 15.
marshallese.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Ejjañin. Kōjerbal juon clock, timeline, ak minit ālikin lukwōn boñ.
marshallese.moving_to_another_missed_challenge: Eṃṃakūt ñan bar juon challenge eo ear jako.
marshallese.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Retry set eṃōj. Jepḷaak ñan aolep challenges.
marshallese.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Juon practice set epen im ejejjet kōn difficulty bands im juon queue eo ej lale bar kōṃṃan ko rar jako.
marshallese.solved_currently_viewing_challenge: kōṃṃan; challenge eo kwōj lale kiiō
marshallese.find_an_exact_clock_time: Pukot juon awa in clock ejiṃwe.
marshallese.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Durations remaroñ likūt ilo aolepān minit ak ilo awa im minit.
marshallese.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Jeje jumps ñan awa eobrak epidodo.
marshallese.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Ukōt kajjojo awa ñan minit ālikin lukwōn boñ.
marshallese.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Ñan juon jino ejako, bwini likḷọk jān jeṃḷọk eo.
marshallese.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Eḷḷā jān lukwōn boñ ej jino juon 24-hour cycle ekāāl.
marshallese.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Lo awa, bwini awa, karōk awa, im kōmeḷeḷeik strategy eo aṃ.
marshallese.time_and_schedule_lab_sections: Ṃōttan ko in Time and Schedule Lab
marshallese.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Awa in clock im joñan awa rej quantities rej oktak. Jeje units ippān durations.
marshallese.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Ejjeḷọk timer pressure · keyboard friendly · ewōr text alternatives
